title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN auth bypass flaw now exploited in attacks
description: Palo Alto Networks is warning that hackers are now exploiting a PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-0257, in attacks attempting to breach corporate networks. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: New CIFSwitch Linux flaw gives root on multiple distributions
description: A newly discovered local privilege escalation vulnerability dubbed 'CIFSwitch' in the Linux kernel could allow attackers to forge CIFS authentication key descriptions, abuse the kernel's key request mechanism, and gain root privileges. [...]
author: Bill Toulas
